aliases: Docker Compose MongoDB Express React Node
Docker Compose MongoDB Node.js React Nginx

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Docker Compose V2 replaced V1 (2023); MongoDB 6.0 replaced mongo shell with mongosh (2022); Node 22 LTS released (2024)

constraints: NEVER store MongoDB credentials in docker-compose.yml -- use .env files or Docker secrets
ALWAYS use named volumes for MongoDB data -- bind mounts risk permission issues on Linux
NEVER use node:latest -- pin to a specific LTS version (e.g., node:22-slim)
ALWAYS run Node.js containers as non-root user (USER node) in production
NEVER expose MongoDB port 27017 to the host in production -- only internal Docker network access
ALWAYS use multi-stage builds for React/Angular frontend to keep production images under 50MB

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need Kubernetes deployment, not Docker Compose
Need Docker Compose for Django/Python backend stack
Need MongoDB standalone deployment without Node.js

inputs_needed.question: Are you using React (MERN) or Angular (MEAN) for the frontend?
Is this for development (hot reload) or production (optimized builds)?
